description: A customizable buttongroup component that groups multiple Modus buttons together. The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting content within the buttongroup.

properties.name: variant
properties.description: Style variant to apply to all buttons within the button group

properties.name: color
properties.description: Color to apply to all buttons within the button group

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Disables all buttons within the button group

properties.name: orientation
properties.description: Orientation of the button group: horizontal or vertical

events.name: buttonGroupClick
events.description: Event emitted when any button in the group is clicked

events.name: buttonSelectionChange
events.description: Event emitted when button selection changes
